title: Optimized + QoL Improvements
description: [1.20-26.1.2] This modpack has been created to maximize and optimize your overall FPS, latency, launch-time, memory usage, and still have support for things such as Shaders, MiniMaps, and full customizeability of all in-game graphics settings.
body:
As Per Modrinth's Official Tweet:
*"We are happy to confirm that all projects created on Modrinth since our founding have been scanned and are not affected by fractureiser, and therefore are safe from the recent malware outbreak. Modrinth was not affected by this attack."*

***ALL*** Mods in this ModPack are sourced from **Modrinth** and all original creators are to take credit for their great work. This is only a compilation of these great works and blends them together nicely. Please note the descriptions I have provided are pulled from official mod's sources here on Modrinth. If you would like to look into a mod project further please scroll down to the Dependencies and select the mod you wish to learn more about.

**Better F3:**
BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.  
**Better Ping Display:**
Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list.  
**Borderless Mining:**
Changes Fullscreen to use a borderless window.  
**Complementary Reimagined:**
High quality, well optimized shader pack that aims for perfection.  
**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric):**
A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.  
**Continuity:**
A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures.  
~~**Cull Less Leaves:**~~ Functionality is supported in More Culling and has been replaced.
Cull leaves while looking hot!  
~~**DashLoader:**~~
Launch at the speed of light.  
**Debugify:**
Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker  
**Distant Horizons:**
See farther without turning your game into a slide show  
**Entity Culling:**
Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible.  
**Fabric API:**
Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.  
**Fabric Language Kotlin:**
It's in the name.  
**Imediately Fast:**
Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.  
**Indium:**
Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo.  
**Inventory Profiles Next:**
Take control over you inventory. Sort. Move matching Items. Throw all. Locked slots. Gear sets! And much more.  
**Iris Shaders:**
A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs.  
**Jade:**
Shows information about what you are looking at. (Hwyla/Waila fork for Minecraft 1.16+)  
**JourneyMap:** Re-implemented upon request.  ~~~~
Real-time mapping in game or in a web browser as you explore.  
**LazyDFU:**
Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization.  
**More Culling**
A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance.  
**libIPN:**
Inventory Profiles Next GUI/Config library  
**Lithium:**
No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod.  
**Mod Menu:**
Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.  
**Reese's Sodium Options:**
Alternative Options Menu for Sodium.  
**Server Pinger Fixer**
Improves pinging speed of the multiplayer server list.  **Sodium:**
Modern rendering engine and client-side optimization mod for Minecraft  
**Sodium Extra:**
Features that shouldn't be in Sodium.  
**Sound Controller:**
Sound Controller is a mod that provides complete control over the volume of every sound in the game.  
**Starlight:**
Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors.  
**Very Many Players:**
A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts.  
**YetAnotherConfigLib:**
A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.  
**Zoomify:**
A zoom mod with infinite customizability.
